name: sidecar
description: /sidecar <args> — thin wrapper over the `sidecar` marketplace CLI (host-local, on PATH via `hx install sidecar`). Verbs — init (scaffold project.tape + CLAUDE.md symlink + LATTICE_POLICY.md) · sync (pull marketplace + refresh cache + installed_plugins.json + enable plugins + mirror commands) · mirror (refresh ~/.claude/commands/ mirrors so plugin commands are bare-invocable — `Skill("imagine")` instead of `Skill("imagine:imagine")` — auto-runs at sync tail) · sign (user sign-off gate). `sign <key>` mints a 5-min token at ~/.sidecar/signs/<key>.sign that unlocks agent edits to a sign-gated governance SSOT file — the sign-guard hook hard-denies those edits until a fresh token exists; keys are `commons` (commons.tape) and `project` (project.tape). Bare `sign` / `sign --list` shows active tokens; `sign clear [<key>]` removes them. Multi-user enable profiles — `profile [<name>]` shows or sets the enable profile (minimal = core only · hexa = core + hexa-lang · full = everything, the default · master = full + creator-only plugins), `enable`/`disable <plugin>` force one plugin on/off as a per-plugin override, `reset <plugin>` drops the override so it follows the profile; each re-applies the install. `master [on|off|status]` mints/removes the ~/.sidecar/master creator marker — a `master`-tier plugin enables ONLY while that marker exists (force-disabled otherwise, even under full/master profile; a per-plugin override still escape-hatches). Profile state lives in ~/.sidecar/profile + ~/.sidecar/plugin-overrides.json; install.hexa enables a plugin per .claude-plugin/profiles.json tiers (plugin disable, not an in-guard opt-out — @D s11 safe). Args pass through unchanged.
